title: Zava - Online Doctor and Pharmacy Platform
problem: Patients want convenient access to treatments for common conditions but face GP appointment delays and pharmacy queues.
solution: Online doctor platform offering consultations, prescriptions, and medication delivery for common conditions (hair loss, ED, contraception, etc.).
traction_signals: Operating in UK, Germany, France, Italy
regulatory_notes: Licensed online doctor and pharmacy in each market.
varden_fit: Moderate — D2C telemedicine model. Could partner for prescription fulfillment through Varden marketplace.
notes: D2C telemedicine + pharmacy model. Different from B2B marketplace.
